name: ecommerce-eval-final
description: Full SQL capability coverage for e-commerce order analytics dataset

cases.question: How many orders are in the dataset?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: What is the total revenue across all orders?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: What is the average revenue per order?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(revenue)::numeric, 2) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: What is the minimum price across all orders?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(price) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: What is the maximum discount percent applied to any order?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(discount_percent) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: How many orders were placed by customers in the UK?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE country = 'UK'

cases.question: How many orders were placed in February 2024?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE order_date BETWEEN '2024-02-01' AND '2024-02-29'

cases.question: How many orders had a discount greater than 20 percent?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE discount_percent > 20

cases.question: How many orders were not returned?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE is_returned = false

cases.question: How many orders were returned?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE is_returned = true

cases.question: What is the total revenue broken down by country?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT country, ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) AS sum_revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY country ORDER BY sum_revenue DESC

cases.question: What is the total revenue for each product category?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT product_category, ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) AS sum_revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY sum_revenue DESC

cases.question: What is the average order revenue for each product category?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT product_category, ROUND(AVG(revenue)::numeric, 2) AS avg_revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY avg_revenue DESC

cases.question: What is the total quantity sold for each product category?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT product_category, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY total_quantity DESC

cases.question: Which 5 orders had the highest revenue? Return order_id, country, product_category, and revenue.

expect.gold_sql: SELECT order_id, country, product_category, revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Which are the top 3 countries by total revenue?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT country, ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) AS sum_revenue FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY country ORDER BY sum_revenue DESC LIMIT 3

cases.question: Which 5 product categories sold the most units by total quantity?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT product_category, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: What is the total revenue from Electronics orders in the US?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue)::numeric, 2) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE country = 'US' AND product_category = 'Electronics'

cases.question: What is the average discount percent for returned orders?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(discount_percent)::numeric, 2) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE is_returned = true

cases.question: How many orders had a quantity greater than 3 and a discount greater than 10 percent?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> WHERE quantity > 3 AND discount_percent > 10

cases.question: What is the average revenue per unit sold across all orders?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND((SUM(revenue) / SUM(quantity))::numeric, 2) AS avg_revenue_per_unit FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: What percentage of orders were returned?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_returned = true) * 100.0 / COUNT(*))::numeric, 2) AS return_rate FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE>

cases.question: What is the average discount percent for each product category?

expect.gold_sql: SELECT product_category, ROUND(AVG(discount_percent)::numeric, 2) AS avg_discount FROM dataset_<FIXTURE_TABLE> GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY avg_discount DESC

cases.question: What are some general best practices for reducing cart abandonment in e-commerce?
